title: StationStatus
description: The real-time operational state of a shared mobility station, including the number of available docks and vehicles.

stationId.description: Unique identifier of the station being reported

numBikesAvailable.description: Number of bikes currently available for rental

numDocksAvailable.description: Number of empty docking points currently available

isInstalled.description: Whether the station is physically installed and operational

isRenting.description: Whether the station is currently renting bikes

isReturning.description: Whether the station is currently accepting bike returns

lastReported.description: Timestamp of the last status update for this station

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the state was last updated
